0030:1B5B.label: pm_test_teardown
0030:1B5B.comment: PM test exit routine. Called once from 0x1DD3 after a 65536-iteration delay loop. Sequence: (1) CLI; (2) call func_0030_0B75(0) — reads CMOS register 0x8D as cleanup/delay; (3) check secondary completion flag at [BP+0x057E]; (4) if done: save SP, load ES = 0x0058 (descriptor with base 0x0400, i.e. the BDA), write warm-boot re-entry vector 0x1034:0x1BBE to [ES+0x0067] = physical [40:67], then INT 0x20 to trigger the shutdown/reset sequence. Note: physical address annotations in the exec log for ES:0x0067 show 0x5E7 (wrong — computed as selector×16+offset before the seg_to_phys fix); the actual write should hit physical 0x467 = BDA[67h].

0030:1CBB.label: pm_exit_check
0030:1CBB.comment: Load PM data segment selector (from CS:0x0000 = 0x0028) and saved frame base (from CS:0x0002 = EDB0), then check test-completion flag at ES:[BP+0x0580].

0030:1CE6.label: pm_exit_reset
0030:1CE6.comment: PM exit path: triggers CPU reset via keyboard controller (port 0x64 command 0xFE). On 286, this is the only way to leave protected mode. BIOS reads CMOS[0x0F]=0x0A on reset and jumps to the real-mode re-entry point at [40:67] instead of cold-booting.

lineComments.0019:5180: iret used as the target of 'push cs + call 0x5180' trick — a safe 286 PM way to do popf by using iret to restore flags including IF
lineComments.0019:5166: func: safe pushf/popf via iret trick (count=12719). Last call does NOT return to caller — lockup point.
lineComments.0019:85B2: call 0x5166 here (count=12719); next instr test [si+0x05],0x80 only runs 12718 times — 12719th call does not return
lineComments.0019:85B5: return target of call 0x5166 at 0x85B2 — only reached 12718/12719 times (lockup on last call)
lineComments.0019:40C5: INT 0x28 and INT 0x2A handler — just an iret, returns immediately to caller
lineComments.0019:51A8: main 286 PM test loop — calls font functions, INT 0x2A, loops until condition met
lineComments.0019:51BC: int 0x2a with AH=0x84 — not reached in last iteration (lockup happens inside call 0x83d8 before getting here)
lineComments.0019:843D: call func_0019_85AF (count=8427) — sets up DS:SI=0070:0023 then calls func_0019_85B2
lineComments.0019:8628: jb 0x8608 — loop at lbl_0019_8608 (far calls + func_0019_876A), loops while CF set (12718 iterations)
lineComments.0030:1BA9: ES = 0x0058 — GDT descriptor for the BDA segment (base=0x0400); ES:0x0067 = physical [40:67] = BIOS warm-boot re-entry vector
lineComments.0030:1BB1: write warm-boot IP (0x1BBE) to [40:67] — after reset, BIOS reads CMOS[0x0F]=0x0A and jumps to CS:IP stored here (exec log shows wrong phys 0x5E7 due to pre-fix seg_to_phys bug; actual target is 0x467)
lineComments.0030:1BB6: write warm-boot CS (0x1034) to [40:69] — completes the far pointer for post-reset BIOS re-entry into CheckIt
lineComments.0030:1BBC: INT 0x20 — dispatches to PM IDT handler which begins the shutdown sequence; execution resumes at 0x1CA9 (handler redirects IRET past the gap 0x1BBE-0x1CA8)
lineComments.0030:1B60: call func_0030_0B75(arg=0) — reads CMOS register 0x8D (RTC status D) as I/O delay/cleanup before exit
lineComments.0030:1B64: secondary completion flag at [BP+0x057E]; 0 = done, non-zero = error/abort path in gap 0x1B6B-0x1BA4 (not executed this run)
lineComments.0030:1CA9: begin CMOS shutdown-status write: select register 0x0F (Shutdown Status Byte) via port 0x70
lineComments.0030:1CAF: I/O delay: jmp-to-next-instr pairs required after OUT to CMOS ports on 286
lineComments.0030:1CB4: 0x0A = CMOS shutdown status 'jump to dword at [40:67]': after CPU reset, BIOS resumes at the stored real-mode re-entry address rather than cold-booting
lineComments.0030:1CB7: I/O delay: jmp-to-next-instr pairs after writing CMOS data port
lineComments.0030:1CBB: read data segment selector from CS:0x0000 (GDT self-pointer area); CS:0x0002 holds saved frame base pointer
lineComments.0030:1CBF: mov es, ax — set ES = 0x0028 (PM data segment selector for the main data area)
lineComments.0030:1CC6: test-completion flag at ES:[BP+0x0580]; value 0x00 = test done (or passed), non-zero = still running
lineComments.0030:1CCC: if flag == 0 → jump to pm_exit_reset; non-zero path in gap 0x1CCE-0x1CE5 (not executed this run, likely error/abort path)
lineComments.0030:1CE8: port 0x64 command 0xFE = 8042 pulse reset line → CPU hard reset; BIOS reads CMOS[0x0F]=0x0A and jumps to real-mode re-entry point at [40:67]
